# Support

## en-US

Use GitHub issues for reproducible bugs, feature requests, process-pack requests, documentation gaps, and validation improvements.

Do not use public GitHub issues for:

- Secrets, credentials, tenant IDs, OAuth tokens, API keys, or gateway details.
- Customer-sensitive data extracts.
- Screenshots containing confidential business data.
- Vulnerability reports.

For security concerns, follow [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).

## de-DE

Nutze GitHub Issues fuer reproduzierbare Fehler, Feature Requests, Process-Pack-Anfragen, Dokumentationsluecken und Verbesserungen der Validierung.

Nutze oeffentliche GitHub Issues nicht fuer:

- Secrets, Credentials, Tenant IDs, OAuth Tokens, API Keys oder Gateway-Details.
- Kundensensitive Datenextrakte.
- Screenshots mit vertraulichen Business-Daten.
- Vulnerability Reports.

Fuer Sicherheitsmeldungen gilt [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
